gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/175)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/175)
text: رَأَيْتُ دَايَةَ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) تُلْقِمُهُ الْأَرُزَّ وَ تَضْرِبُهُ عَلَيْهِ فَغَمَّنِي مَا رَأَيْتُهُ فَدَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لِي أَحْسَبُكَ غَمَّكَ مَا رَأَيْتَ مِنْ دَايَةِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى قُلْتُ لَهُ نَعَمْ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ

فَقَالَ لِي نِعْمَ الطَّعَامُ الْأَرُزُّ يُوَسِّعُ الْأَمْعَاءَ وَ يَقْطَعُ الْبَوَاسِيرَ وَ إِنَّا لَنَغْبِطُ أَهْلَ الْعِرَاقِ بِأَكْلِهِمُ الْأَرُزَّ وَ الْبُسْرَ فَإِنَّهُمَا يُوَسِّعَانِ الْأَمْعَاءَ وَ يَقْطَعَانِ الْبَوَاسِيرَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, and someone else, from Hisham Bin Al Hakam, from Zurara who said,

‘I saw a nurse-maid of Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> being fed the rice, and she threw it upon him<sup>asws</sup>. So it grieved me, what I saw. So I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> reckon your grief is due to what you saw from a nursemaid of Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup>’. I said, ‘Yes, may I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>’.

So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘The best of the foods is the rice, it expands the intestine, and cuts off the hemorrhoids, and we envy the people of Al-Iraq with their eating of the rice, and partially-ripened dates, for these two expand the intestine and cut off the hemorrhoids’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ’Isma’il ibn Marrar and others from Yunus from Hisham ibn al-Hakam from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once saw the nurse of abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, feed him rice with morsels and threw it on him. It made me upset and I went to see abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, who said to me, ‘I think what you have seen from the nurse of abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has made you upset.’ I replied, ‘Yes, I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, food from rice expands the intestine and cuts down hemorrhoids. We deem people of Iraq as fortunate for their eating rice and fresh dates because they expand the intestine and cut down hemorrhoids.’”
